elven_darkvision.name: Visão no Escuro Élfica
elven_darkvision.description: Consegues ver na penumbra até 18 metros como se fosse luz brilhante...

military_rank.name: Patente Militar
military_rank.description: Tens uma patente oficial. Soldados de baixa patente respeitam a tua autoridade...

bg_blood_son_rank.name: Blood Son's Military Rank
bg_blood_son_rank.description: You have a military rank from your career as a soldier. Soldiers loyal to your former military organization still recognize your authority and influence, and they defer to you if they are of a lower rank. You can invoke your rank to exert influence over other soldiers and requisition simple equipment or horses for temporary use. You can also usually gain access to friendly military encampments and fortresses where your rank is recognized.

bg_blood_son_specialty.name: Specialty
bg_blood_son_specialty.description: During your time as a soldier, you had a specific role to play in your unit or army. Roll a d8 or choose your role: 1. Officer | 2. Scout | 3. Infantry | 4. Cavalry | 5. Healer | 6. Quartermaster | 7. Standard-bearer | 8. Support staff.

feat_ambassador_culture.name: Cultural Chameleon
feat_ambassador_culture.description: You have an uncanny ability to blend into foreign courts. You can accurately mimic the accent and cadence of a region you have studied for at least one week, allowing you to pass as a native to casual observers.

feat_ambassador_secure_comm.name: Secure Communication
feat_ambassador_secure_comm.description: You are masters of codes and ciphers. You can create written messages that can only be read by specific recipients you designate, or by creatures with a passive Investigation score higher than 20.

feat_mirrish_well_read.name: Mirrish Arcanum Scholaris Student's Well Read
feat_mirrish_well_read.description: To study for your classes you spent countless hours in a library reading scrolls. Once you learn something about your speciality you can recall it easily and without delay and most knowledge that would be commonplace for someone who has studied the subject is know to you as well. Specialists of that field would take a quick liking to you, if for nothing else, for your curiosity for the subject.

feat_mirrish_specialty.name: Specialty
feat_mirrish_specialty.description: During your time as a student, you studied a particular field to advance your curriculum. Roll a d10 or choose your role: 1. Botany | 2. Humanoid Anatomy | 3. Astronomy | 4. Zoology | 5. Arcanology | 6. Engineering | 7. Petrology | 8. Naval Architecture | 9. Alchemy | 10. Metallurgy.

races.name: Elfo
races.description: Criaturas graciosas, mágicas e de longa vida.

backgrounds.name: Soldado
backgrounds.items: Uma insígnia de patente, um troféu de um inimigo caído, roupas comuns.

backgrounds.name: Mirrish Arcanum Scholaris Student
backgrounds.description: The Mirrish Arcanum Scholaris is an institute from the Silvermace Empire that prides itself on being the best in the world when it comes to molding and developing young minds into experts of magic and science.
backgrounds.items: Pouch, Common Clothes, Small Knife, Ink (Bottle), Quill, Colleague's Letter

backgrounds.name: Ambassador of the Lost Realms (TEST BG)
backgrounds.description: You were trained from birth to represent your people in foreign lands, smoothing over conflicts and securing trade routes in realms that have long been isolated.
backgrounds.items: Fine Clothes, Signet Ring, Calligrapher's Supplies, Seal of Office
backgrounds.//_comentario_languages: Exemplo de línguas obrigatórias com níveis de proficiência
backgrounds.//_comentario_languageChoices: Exemplo de múltiplas escolhas de línguas com níveis diferentes

proficiencies.//_comentario_skillChoices: Exemplos de escolhas restritas e genéricas

skillChoices.//_title: Isso implementa a regra: 'Escolha uma skill de Charisma'

backgrounds.name: Blood Son
backgrounds.description: Blood sons are military officers who are training to be a village leader. They have endured war against the Silvermace Empire and now seek something more.
backgrounds.items: Fine Clothes, Signet Ring, Scroll of Investiture, Purse
